name: ASKIN TUMOR
definition: EXTRASKELETAL EWING SARCOMA = PRIMITIVE NEUROECTODERMAL TUMOR (PNET) uncommon tumor probably arising from intercostal nerves

demographics.Path: neuroectodermal small cell tumor containing neuron-specific enolase (may also be found

dominant_finding: large unilateral heterogeneous chest wall mass with intra- and extrathoracic components
discriminating_features: large tumor involving chest wall + pleura
rib destruction (occasionally arising from rib) in 25-63%

general: large tumor involving chest wall + pleura
rib destruction (occasionally arising from rib) in 25-63%
CT: large unilateral heterogeneous chest wall mass with intra- and extrathoracic components
± pleural, pericardial, diaphragmatic, vertebral, spinal extension and involvement
MR: predominantly intermediate SI on T1WI + high SI on T2WI
prominent areas of high SI on T2WI ← hemorrhage + necrosis
commonly invasion of chest wall musculature + mediastinum + lung
